title: Global gas prices rise as supplies tighten
section_path: Global gas prices rise as supplies tighten
section_path_text: Global gas prices rise as supplies tighten
summary:
Main
A surging USD continues to batter commodity markets. However, supply-side issues helped energy markets push higher. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-11-13 134553.png | assets/2024-11-13_global-gas-prices-rise-as-supplies-tighten_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_51a0ac2fa75d.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices edged higher as tightness in the physical market offset bearish sentiment on demand.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A surging USD continues to batter commodity markets. However, supply-side issues helped energy markets push higher.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices edged higher as tightness in the physical market offset bearish sentiment on demand. Buyers in the physical market have been particularly active, with any available cargoes being snapped up quickly.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: China continues to import strong levels of coal despite its inventories at record highs. Concerns of energy security and supply shortages remain the key driver.
